name: Tortilla Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 pound ground round or ground sirloin
2 cups ricotta cheese, part skim milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Use the canned sauce of your choice, about a 30 ounce jar.
2. Brown ground round or sirloin in a skillet and drain thoroughly.
3. If using fattier meat, drain very thoroughly.
4. Add the sauce, seasoning spice, and chopped green chiles to the skillet. Simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Mix ricotta cheese and eggs in a small bowl, blending well.
6. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
7. Place half a cup of sauce in each of two pie plates or similar sized oven-proof dishes, spreading to cover the bottom.
8. Lay one tortilla on top of each dish.
9. Spread one-eighth of the ricotta-egg mixture over each tortilla.
10. Top with about one-third cup of meat sauce mixture, one-third cup grated cheese, and sprinkle sliced olives over each.
11. Continue layering with remaining ingredients, ending with meat sauce and jack cheese on top.
12. Bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes.
13. Let stand a few minutes before slicing into pie-shaped wedges and serving immediately.
